page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.4xlarge is an arm64-based server powered by the custom Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 processor. Running on the KVM hypervisor, this instance features 16 dedicated physical cores with 1 thread per core, operating at a clock speed of 2.75 GHz. It is equipped with 32.0 GB of memory, yielding a compute-optimized 2.0 GB of RAM per core. Cache resources include 64 KB L1d, 1.0 MB L2, and 64 MB L3 cache. This server does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and featuring a baseline network bandwidth of 10 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate solid capabilities across standard compute tasks. The single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU tests score 1816.59 and 28931.94 respectively, placing them in the average tier. Notably, the server demonstrates strong multi-threaded decompression performance, with bzip3 reaching 169.6 GB/sec. Memory subsystem performance is also robust, highlighted by a strong PassMark memory score of 2830.4 and a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 1633.05 GB/sec. However, encryption performance is a relative bottleneck, with the PassMark CPU encryption test scoring in the weak tier at 2612.79.

Given its arm64 architecture and compute-focused 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.c8y.4xlarge offers high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for workloads optimized for ARM instruction sets. It is well-suited for multi-threaded data processing, Redis key-value stores, static web serving, and lightweight machine learning tasks, such as prompt processing and text generation with small language models.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.4xlarge is an arm64 compute-optimized server powered by a 2.75 GHz Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 processor. It features 16 dedicated physical cores, 32.0 GB of RAM, and a 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, with no local storage or GPU accelerators. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, it delivers balanced performance across standard benchmarks, highlighted by strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and high memory bandwidth. While encryption performance is relatively weak, its high-density ARM architecture provides excellent qualitative cost efficiency for multi-threaded processing, Redis databases, static web serving, and lightweight LLM inference.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c8y.4xlarge is an arm64 server featuring 16 dedicated Yitian710 cores, 32 GB RAM, and 10 Gbps network speed, optimized for multi-threaded processing and web serving.

tagline: An arm64 compute-optimized instance featuring dedicated physical cores and high memory bandwidth for efficient multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: Powered by 16 dedicated Alibaba Yitian YiTian710 arm64 cores at 2.75 GHz
Equipped with 32.0 GB of RAM and 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth
Strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and memory performance
No local storage or GPU accelerators included
Optimized for Redis, static web serving, and lightweight LLM inference
